name: Pink Sand
description: Sun-kissed pink with a fine sandy shimmer.
longDescription: Pink Sand is the everyday pink that goes with absolutely everything. A warm, peachy-pink with delicate gold pearl, it gives your lips that soft, just-back-from-the-beach glow without ever feeling sticky.
ingredients: Polybutene, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Mica, CI 77491, Tocopheryl Acetate, Squalane, Fragrance.
howToUse: Glide a thin layer across clean lips. Reapply through the day for a fresh, dewy finish.

name: Silly Coco
description: Creamy coconut nude with a glassy finish.
longDescription: Silly Coco is the nude that doesn't disappear — a warm, milky coconut tone that gives lips dimension without overpowering them. Layer it over your favourite lipstick or wear it solo for that lit-from-within finish.
ingredients: Polybutene, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, CI 77491, Coconut Oil, Tocopheryl Acetate, Squalane, Fragrance.
howToUse: Apply directly with the doe-foot applicator. Press lips together to blend.

name: Creamy Cloud
description: Pillow-soft pink with a subtle plumping tingle.
longDescription: Creamy Cloud feels like its name — a soft, milky pink with a gentle cooling tingle that makes lips look fuller in a single coat. Romantic, weightless, and perfect for your most photographed days.
ingredients: Polybutene, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Menthone Glycerin Acetal, Palmitoyl Oligopeptide, CI 77491, Tocopheryl Acetate.
howToUse: Apply directly. A light tingle is normal — it's the plumping working.

name: Dream
description: Hazy pinky mauve with a soft pearl finish.
longDescription: Dream is the gloss that lives up to its name — a slightly cool pinky-mauve with the kind of soft pearl shimmer that catches the light from every angle. Wearable, photogenic, completely yours.
ingredients: Polybutene, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Mica, CI 77491, Tocopheryl Acetate, Squalane, Fragrance.
howToUse: Single coat for a soft wash, two for a fuller finish.

name: Eclairs
description: Glossy caramel brown — the modern '90s lip.
longDescription: Eclairs is the brown gloss your '90s playlist deserves. Warm, caramel-toned and richly pigmented, with a high-shine finish that brings the shade firmly into 2026. Pairs effortlessly with everything.
ingredients: Polybutene, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, CI 77491, CI 77492, Mica, Tocopheryl Acetate, Fragrance.
howToUse: Outline with the applicator, fill in, blot for a softer finish.

name: Kiss
description: Pinch-of-the-cheek pink with a wet-look shine.
longDescription: Kiss is the bright, blue-toned pink that turns a basic outfit into a moment. Pigmented in a single swipe, glossy without going sticky, and built to outlast that one slightly-too-long phone call.
ingredients: Polybutene, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, CI 15850, Mica, Tocopheryl Acetate, Squalane, Fragrance.
howToUse: Apply directly. Blot for a softer stain finish.

name: Obsession
description: Saturated wine red with glass-like shine.
longDescription: Obsession is the red you'll keep coming back to — a deep, vinous red with enough warmth to flatter every undertone. The non-bleeding formula stays put, fades evenly, and leaves a soft stain that feels effortlessly expensive.
ingredients: Polybutene, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, CI 15850, CI 77491, Mica, Tocopheryl Acetate, Fragrance.
howToUse: Outline with a clear liner if you want sharper edges, then fill in with the applicator.

name: Paris
description: Effortless rose with a quiet-luxury finish.
longDescription: Paris is the gloss that makes a plain white tee feel like an outfit. A soft, dusty rose with a high-shine finish that flatters across skin tones, and the quiet kind of elegance that doesn't try too hard.
ingredients: Polybutene, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, CI 77491, Mica, Rosehip Oil, Tocopheryl Acetate, Fragrance.
howToUse: Apply to bare lips. Reapply through the day for a dewy, lived-in finish.

name: Tempt
description: Vampy berry-plum with a subtle plumping cool.
longDescription: Tempt is for the nights that turn into mornings. A deep, blue-toned berry with a gentle plumping tingle, finished with a glossy lacquer that catches the light beautifully. A little dramatic. A lot photogenic.
ingredients: Polybutene, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Menthone Glycerin Acetal, CI 77491, CI 15850, Mica, Tocopheryl Acetate.
howToUse: Apply directly. A light tingle is normal — that's the plumping in action.

name: Tangy Tease
description: Juicy sunset coral with a delicate gold shimmer.
longDescription: Tangy Tease is the warm, sun-soaked coral your everyday makeup has been missing. Bright, bouncy, and laced with fine gold pearl, it's the kind of colour that makes a plain summer outfit feel intentional.
ingredients: Polybutene, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, CI 15850, Mica, CI 77891, Tocopheryl Acetate, Fragrance.
howToUse: One coat for a fresh wash, two for impact.
